channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Heat extend winning streak to 6 games and snap Celtics' 9-game streak with 124-103 victory
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Tyler Herro had 25 points and nine assists and the Miami Heat extended their season-best winning streak to six games with a 124-103 victory over the Boston Celtics on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: LaVar Arrington II following in father's footsteps
item.description: UNIVERSITY PAR, Pa. (WTAJ) -- In the late 90's LaVar Arrington starred at Penn State as an All-American linebacker. He was enshrined in the College Football Hall Of Fame and defined the legend of Penn State's number 11.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Risky, PHL 17

item.title: High school track athlete, 16, fatally stabbed at championship meet, officials say
item.description: A 16-year-old high school track athlete was allegedly killed by a member of another team during a championship meet Wednesday in Frisco, Texas.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NBA investigating Warriors’ Buddy Hield, Grizzlies’ Ja Morant over gun gestures: reports
item.description: Both players could be seen making gun-like gestures at one another during the Warriors’ game in Memphis.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Red Sox ink top prospect to big extension after just 5 MLB games
item.description: The Boston Red Sox and one of their top prospects Kristian Campbell have agreed to a deal that can keep him on the team for 10 seasons — he's played in just five MLB games.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: UConn's Paige Bueckers and Geno Auriemma share mutual respect heading into the Final Four
item.description: SPOKANE, Wash. (AP) — Following UConn's victory over Southern California that sent the Huskies to the Final Four, Paige Bueckers and coach Geno Auriemma huddled over the contents of the box score.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Paige Spiranac touts fitness transformation while firing back at critic
item.description: Golf influencer Paige Spiranac showed off her fitness transformation while she clapped back at a critical comment on social media Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: GJ Tigers Girls Soccer pours it on Central 10-0
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — There was no moment to take a breath at Unity Field Tuesday night. Seemingly every few seconds yielded a breakaway chance for the Grand Junction Tigers' aggressive attack. And many of those chances were cashed in by the Tigers. Ten of them.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Caleb Williams' development, Bears search for "weapons" and Kyler Gordon's contract extension with The Athletic's Kevin Fishbain
item.description: The Chicago Bears are looking to develop Caleb Williams and use their top draft picks to bolster their offense, while also focusing on adding a dynamic running back and working on a contract extension for Kyler Gordon.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: Michigan State's Holloman, Booker, Michigan's Donaldson enter transfer portal, St. John's adds Sanon
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Michigan State's Tre Holloman plans to end his college career at another school and Xavier Booker is shooting for a fresh start. Holloman's agent, Brandon Grier, said the guard entered the transfer portal and informed coach Tom Izzo of his decision on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz clinch worst record in franchise history
item.description: CHARLOTTE (ABC4 Sports) - It's official. The 2024-25 Utah Jazz will have the worst record in franchise history. Miles Bridges had 26 points, 10 rebounds and eight assists and the Charlotte Hornets defeated the Jazz 110-106 on Monday night hand Utah is 60th loss of the season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NFL owners meetings kick off in South Florida
item.description: With free agency still in full swing and the NFL Draft less than a month away, NFL owners, head coaches, and front office executives have made their way to The Breakers in Palm Beach for the league's annual owners meetings.
item.dc:creator: Kenny Morales, WFLA, NBC

item.title: The NHL and Rogers agree on 12-year, $7.7 US billion media rights deal in Canada, AP source says
item.description: The NHL has reached an agreement with Rogers Communications on a 12-year, $7.7 US billion media rights agreement in Canada.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Whyno, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Lee Cummard named BYU women's basketball coach
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU has named Lee Cummard as its next women's basketball head coach. Cummard has been the interim head coach since Amber Whiting resigned after three seasons on March 8.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Royals' Jonathan India hit by 99 mph fastball, leaves game
item.description: "He threw a pitch that he doesn't ever throw, the pitch before, which was a four-seam fastball. It was his first one of the year," Pasquantino said.
item.dc:creator: Jared Bush, NewsNation

item.title: Duke and Florida move on to Final Four
item.description: Florida and Duke won their regions on Saturday, with fellow top seeds Houston and Auburn set to play on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Moncada and Soriano deliver as the Angels edge the White Sox 1-0
item.description: Yoán Moncada hit an RBI single against his former team in the eighth inning, and the Los Angeles Angels blanked the Chicago White Sox 1-0 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Bulls face the Mavericks on 4-game win streak
item.description: Dallas Mavericks (36-38, 10th in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (33-40, ninth in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EDT BOTTOM LINE: Chicago aims to keep its four-game win streak intact when the Bulls take on Dallas. The Bulls are 14-22 in home games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: DePaul women's basketball coach Doug Bruno steps down after 39 seasons
item.description: CHICAGO — Chicago has produced a lot of basketball icons and one of them in Lincoln Park is stepping down — DePaul's longtime women's basketball coach Doug Bruno.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: SF's Chase Center hosting NCAA Men's Basketball games Thursday, Saturday
item.description: (BCN) -- San Francisco is hosting two games at Chase Center on Thursday in the NCAA Men's Basketball Championship tournament. At 4:39 p.m., University of Florida, which is the No. 1 seed in the West region of the tournament's bracket, plays No. 4 University of Maryland.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: Florida coach brings team to famed local staple ahead of March Madness matchup in SF
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- Florida head coach Todd Golden is excited to be back in San Francisco this week -- a city where he began his head coaching career. Golden leads the No. 1 seed Gators for their Sweet 16 matchup Thursday against No. 4 seed Maryland.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4
